title: senecio spiculosus
intro: Senecio spiculosus, also known as prickly groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including being a bitter tonic and a diuretic, which helps to reduce fluid retention. The health benefits of Senecio spiculosus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal uses.
